check_content_excerpt:
Verify the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Windows Components >> Microsoft Defender Antivirus >> Configure local administrator merge behavior for lists is set to "Enabled". Otherwise, this is a finding.

Procedure: Use the Windows Registry Editor to navigate to the following key: 
HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender

Criteria: If the value "DisableLocalAdminMerge" is REG_DWORD = 1, this is not a finding.

If the value is 0, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt:
Set the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Windows Components >> Microsoft Defender Antivirus  >> Configure local administrator merge behavior for lists to "Enabled".

Click "OK".

Click "Apply".
title: Microsoft Defender AV must configure local administrator merge behavior for lists.
